title: GIF Poop - Link: The Real Faces of Evil
description:
Originally made by TheSwedishDork, who recently closed his account.

CD-i, is it AIDS?
No, I think its something else...
It's Weegee!

Gay Luigi starts an epidemic in the Mushroom Kingdom that only Link can get rid of.

Audio
Some islamic prayer
You're the Best Around (some version)
Sephfire: Mario Paint Intense Color
CD-i games below
